articles.description: Is Tottenham Hotspur's superb win at Aston Villa the moment the tide turned in  their fight against Premier League relegation, asks chief football writer Phil McNulty?
articles.title: Aston Villa 1-2 Tottenham Hotspur: Is Villa victory moment tide turned for troubled Spurs?

articles.title: Espanyol vs Real Madrid: Spanish La Liga stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Kimi Antonelli's first season in F1 showed occasional promise, but nothing that suggested this was going to come next, writes Andrew Benson.
articles.title: Miami Grand Prix: Kimi Antonelli steps up his level this season in dramatic fashion

articles.description: Former broadcasting executive Neil Duncanson and author Alex Fynn, who made remarkably accurate predictions about football's future in 1994, discuss what the game will look like in 10 years' time.
articles.title: Predicting the future of football: 'Premflix' and fans paying more

articles.description: Unless Manchester United appoint Luis Enrique, it is hard to think of an acceptable alternative to giving Michael Carrick the job on a permanent basis, writes Simon Stone.
articles.title: Man Utd secure Champions League spot - why not appoint Michael Carrick now?

articles.description: BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the Miami Grand Prix.
articles.title: Miami Grand Prix: Harry Benjamin's driver ratings for weekend of fourth race in 2026

articles.description: Wu Yize opens up a 10-7 lead over Shaun Murphy in the World Championship final to put himself on course to become second-youngest player ever to be crowned a Crucible champion.
articles.title: World Snooker Championship 2026: Wu Yize in control of Crucible final against Shaun Murphy

articles.description: Tottenham's 2-1 win at Aston Villa moved them out of the Premier League relegation zone - but who are now the favourites to go down?
articles.title: Premier League: Who will get relegated? Tottenham, West Ham, Nottingham Forest?

articles.description: Liverpool boss Arne Slot was furious with Manchester United's second goal being allowed to stand, but the Reds boss highlighted other issues to address following 3-2 defeat.
articles.title: Liverpool news: Arne Slot furious with VAR but side's issues highlighted by loss

articles.description: Inter Milan win their 21st Scudetto with a 2-0 win over Parma at San Siro, with goals from Marcus Thuram and Henrikh Mkhitaryan.
articles.title: Inter Milan title: Cristian Chivu's side confirm 21st Scudetto with victory over Parma
